purpose: Provide a bounded, machine-readable summary of how the public specs repository hardened over time so external reviewers can see active maintenance instead of inferring it from raw git history alone.

milestones.title: Initial public open-core projection
milestones.focus: Created the first clean public projection with core docs, schema, examples, provenance, and release-review scaffolding.
milestones.maintenance_signal: public-safe projection was established as a standalone reviewer-facing surface

milestones.title: Verification stack and linked examples
milestones.focus: Strengthened example validation, linked-example checking, and repo-local verification so the public sample set became machine-checkable.
milestones.maintenance_signal: example integrity moved from prose-only to validator-backed checks

milestones.title: API, catalog, and release evidence
milestones.focus: Added machine-readable contract discovery, route-oriented reference material, legal notice, and release evidence suitable for external review.
milestones.maintenance_signal: release state became explicit, reviewable, and machine-readable

milestones.title: Community health and intake verification
milestones.focus: Added contributor intake surfaces, issue templates, and explicit community-health verification for public maintainer operations.
milestones.maintenance_signal: outside contribution posture became bounded and reviewable

milestones.title: Reviewer profile and capability mapping
milestones.focus: Added machine-readable reviewer shortcuts and practical capability coverage so outside evaluators can assess the repo quickly.
milestones.maintenance_signal: external review path became explicit instead of filename-driven

milestones.title: Projection doctrine and boundary mapping
milestones.focus: Made source-of-truth hierarchy, published boundaries, deferred domains, and generator readiness explicit for the public surface.
milestones.maintenance_signal: published-vs-deferred scope became explicit and machine-readable

milestones.title: Portability and archive contract surface
milestones.focus: Added public no-lock-in posture, archive bundle contract, and portability profile without pretending the full hosted runtime is public.
milestones.maintenance_signal: trust posture expanded from format docs to explicit portability contracts

milestones.title: Failure model and negative evidence
milestones.focus: Made fail-closed semantics and high-signal negative paths explicit instead of relying on happy-path examples alone.
milestones.maintenance_signal: negative-path behavior became part of the public trust contract

milestones.title: Traceability and example coverage
milestones.focus: Connected public claims to strongest evidence and made the bounded coverage of capsule/API examples explicit.
milestones.maintenance_signal: claim-to-evidence review and example coverage became machine-readable

milestones.title: Maintenance, change control, and ownership
milestones.focus: Made public maintainer workflow, change classes, and artifact-family authority explicit for bounded outside collaboration.
milestones.maintenance_signal: public governance moved from implied conventions to machine-readable contracts

milestones.title: Dependency graph and assurance review
milestones.focus: Added bounded reading-order navigation, explicit public claims, and the strongest-evidence layer for reviewer-oriented trust assessment.
milestones.maintenance_signal: reviewer navigation and bounded public claims became explicit and machine-checkable

milestones.title: Update coherence and limitations register
milestones.focus: Closed the release-discipline loop by publishing sync groups, deferred scope, non-promises, and explicit limitations for the public surface.
milestones.maintenance_signal: co-moving release surfaces and public non-promises became explicit reviewer-facing constraints

milestones.title: Maintainer projection loop proven
milestones.focus: Proved that 22 public machine-readable summary layers can remain tracked GitHub artifacts while being regenerated from bounded maintainer-side capsule sources without leaking the private vault.
milestones.maintenance_signal: public summary surfaces are now demonstrably downstream of governed maintainer-side projection workflows rather than manual JSON editing
